query: scratched dusty damaged old film negative photo
message: sub:film_artifacts/scratch_decay — anti_aesthetic — scratches, dust spots, chemical stains, tintype/wet-plate degradation

response.objective_caption: A close-up photograph of a blue surface covered with an extensive network of fine white scratches, linear abrasions, scuff marks, and scattered residue. The surface exhibits tonal variation from deep navy in the upper portion to slightly teal hues toward the bottom right, with the textured material filling the entire frame edge to edge.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A degraded and heavily worn blue surface captures a sense of entropy and material decay through an extensive network of scratches, abrasions, and accumulated residue. The aged, neglected material shifts from deep navy to teal tones, presenting a detailed document of deterioration and prolonged physical breakdown across the entire frame.
